hero.title: Build faster websites with JSON content
hero.description: This website uses Next.js and JSON files as the main content source.

items.title: Website development
items.description: We build fast, modern, and scalable websites.

items.title: Content management
items.description: We organize website content using structured JSON files.

items.title: Localization
items.description: We prepare translated content for multilingual websites.

workflow.title: From content to live site — in minutes
workflow.subtitle: A modern stack that keeps editors happy and developers sane.

steps.title: Edit content in Strapi
steps.description: Your team manages all content through Strapi's friendly admin panel. No code, no deployments — just write and publish.

steps.title: Export clean JSON
steps.description: One command pulls structured JSON from Strapi directly into the project. Version-controlled, typed, and always in sync.

steps.title: Deploy a blazing-fast site
steps.description: Next.js generates every page statically. Zero server costs, instant load times, and global CDN delivery via Vercel.
